entry: AAA Nico meeting result: Build Show approved Tue/Thu 2-4PM. Some calls public, some private. Consent protocol required. YouTube live link and Circle listing still needed.
Phase Roadmap dashboard built — new tab in Mission Control. 5 phase columns, checkable items, progress bars, add-item per phase. Live at http://192.168.4.24:3000.
Builder's Blueprint + Rock Castle Outreach Tracker posted to Discord in full (readable text, all sections).
AAA approved Build Show: Tue/Thu 2-4PM live coaching calls. Some public, some private. Consent protocol required per call. Phase 1 updated.
Morning brief posted. Overnight output (Builder's Blueprint + Outreach Tracker) not surfaced — cron fixed to check prior day memory going forward.

Overnight: Built Rock Castle AI Outreach Tracker (research/rock-castle-outreach-tracker.html) — 13 Nashville prospects, priority tiered, first-touch messages. Built Builder's Blueprint lead magnet (content/lead-magnets/builders-blueprint.md) — 12-section framework, ~3,000 words, CTA to Builders Society.
Assisted Living Kitchen OS deal brief complete — research/2026-03-04-assisted-living-kitchen-os-deal-brief.md. Market pricing, IP terms, revenue splits, conversation prep for owner meeting.
Erik approved overnight tasks: Rock Castle outreach tracker + Builder's Blueprint lead magnet.
Overnight cron split into 7PM pitch + 9PM execution. Morning brief updated to post Discord output before sending. Fixes overnight Discord notification issue.
Morning brief posted. Quote: Confucius — 'The man who moves a mountain begins by carrying away small stones.'

Overnight work (pre-split cron): Rock Castle Nashville prospect research — 13 prospects identified, competitive landscape mapped, outreach sequence recommended. Saved to research/2026-03-03-rock-castle-nashville-prospects.md.
The Build Show format confirmed: two-part (live AAA coaching + teaching segment). OBS → YouTube. Equipment installed: monitor/teleprompter.
Cost optimization: switched to Option D (noon + 7PM compression + MEMORY.md pruning). Noon compression cron added. MEMORY.md trimmed ~35%.
Dowdle Construction: developer brief revised and resent. New bid structure requested. Presentation to Dowdle scheduled Wednesday March 11.
ManyChat lead magnet research complete — research/2026-03-03-manychat-lead-magnets.md. Build scheduled April 1.
Phase Roadmap approved and saved — strategy/phase-roadmap.md. $1M by end of 2026. 5 phases, Jerusalem model.
Social media channel map finalized — strategy/social-media-channel-map.md. All brands mapped across YouTube, LinkedIn, Instagram, Facebook.
Session compressed (context 71% full, $12.85 spent). MEMORY.md fully updated. Nightly compression now standard.
Content pipeline architecture doc complete — content-pipeline-architecture.md. Plan A/B/C with cost estimates.
Mission Control dashboard live at http://192.168.4.24:3000. Task board, activity log, idea queue.
Discord workspace configured — 5 channels live. Sub-agents Scout and Builder configured in OpenClaw.
Foreman online. Workspace initialized. Telegram groups, cron jobs, knowledge pack loaded. Named by Erik Bledsoe.
